creator: jerry.hicks@glenayre.com
text:
change MAINTAINER to Jerry.Hicks@Glenayre.com on

The existing crossm68k port should be removed and replaced by
crossm68k-devel.  The original port name 'crossm68k' should be
kept.

We've been using this port with good success on 2.2.x-STABLE.  I don't
have a -CURRENT system just yet to test it on.  Volunteers?  :-)
